package.name: perceptbot_interfaces
package.description: AIR26 workshop 05 — interfaces for the perception rover (microbot + a front camera). Extends the project-02 set: SetBehavior now switches six behaviours (obstacle 1-3, light 4, colour 5, ArUco 6); CheckOpenings + EscapeObstacle are carried over; ApproachMarker is the new "move to / follow the ArUco marker" action (waypoint-like, with feedback + cancel).
